name: Brownie Cookie (the Chewy)
recipeIngredient: 2 cups semi-sweet chocolate chips (12 oz package)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 375°F.
2. In a large mixing bowl, combine Crisco, brown sugar, water, and vanilla extract. Mix until well blended.
3. Add eggs to the mixture and beat at medium speed until incorporated.
4. Gradually add flour, cocoa, baking powder, and salt. Mix at low speed until just combined.
5. Fold in chocolate chips.
6. Drop rounded tablespoonfuls of dough about 2 inches apart onto ungreased baking sheets.
7. Bake one sheet at a time in the oven for 7-9 minutes, or until cookies are set. They should appear soft and moist; do not overbake.
8. Allow cookies to cool on the sheets for 2 minutes. Then transfer them to foil to cool completely.
